movie.actors: Kevin Costner, Morgan Freeman, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio, Christian Slater
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 16 wins & 19 nominations.
movie.plot: When Robin and his Moorish companion come to England and the tyranny of the Sheriff of Nottingham, he decides to fight back as an outlaw.
movie.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
movie.writer: Pen Densham (story), Pen Densham (screenplay), John Watson (screenplay)
